title: Plugin marketplace + signature verification + per-plugin MCP configs
description:
OC has plugins/ framework; CC has marketplace (npm-like install/update), signature verification (ed25519 per author), per-plugin MCP server configs (pluginConfigs.<id>.mcpServers).

## Scope
- Marketplace registry format (.toml or .yaml pointing to git/url sources)
- 'openclaudia plugin install <name@marketplace>' subcommand
- Signature verification (ed25519) for trusted authors
- Per-plugin MCP configs threaded into mcp.rs init
- Config: enabledPlugins, skippedPlugins, strictKnownMarketplaces, blockedMarketplaces

## References
- /home/doll/claude-code/plugins/
